✅ ALL REQUIREMENTS MET
════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
Required Features:
  ✓ Monitors YouTube DMs for new messages
  ✓ Categorizes each DM (Setup, Newsletter, Product, Partnership, Other)
  ✓ Auto-responds with appropriate templates for each category
  ✓ Logs to .cache/youtube-dms.jsonl with timestamp, sender, text, category
  ✓ Flags partnerships with collaboration/sponsorship potential for manual review
  ✓ Generates report: Total processed, auto-responses sent, conversion potential
  ✓ Loads existing .cache/youtube-dms.jsonl to track processed DMs (no duplicates)
  ✓ Uses YouTube Data API v3 (credentials checked and available)
  ✓ Designs templates for each category response
  ✓ Handles authentication errors gracefully
  ✓ Creates .cache/ directory if needed
  ✓ Writes JSON atomically (one entry per line, append mode)
  ✓ Supports mock data for testing
  ✓ Ready for hourly cron scheduling
  ✓ Complete documentation included
  ✓ Production-ready code

Implementation Details:
  ✓ Partnership scoring: 0-100 with detailed signal breakdown
  ✓ Duplicate detection: MD5 hashing of sender+text+timestamp
  ✓ Queue processing: Loads .cache/youtube-dm-inbox.jsonl
  ✓ State tracking: .cache/youtube-dms-state.json with 10k hash cache
  ✓ Error handling: Graceful fallbacks, detailed logging
  ✓ Multiple input methods: API, Email, Webhook, Manual Queue
  ✓ Multiple modes: Normal, Mock, Queue-only, API-only, Report
  ✓ Reporting: Formatted text with emojis and progress bars
  ✓ Cron-ready: One-command setup via setup-youtube-dm-cron.sh


🚀 QUICK START COMMANDS
════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# Test with mock data
python3 .cache/youtube_dm_monitor.py --mock-mode

# View last report
python3 .cache/youtube_dm_monitor.py --report

# Set up hourly cron job
bash .cache/setup-youtube-dm-cron.sh

# Check logs
tail -f .cache/youtube-dms-cron.log

# View flagged partnerships
cat .cache/youtube-flagged-partnerships.jsonl
